text.title: Verbatim To Backlog Pattern Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Verbatim To Backlog Pattern end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: extract
step.action: Mine pain statements with timestamps + source.

step.name: cluster
step.action: Embed + cluster by similarity; tune threshold.

step.name: frame
step.action: Per cluster, author Job Story card with ≥2 verbatim quotes attached.
